TM TimeMaxx Productivity app by Jacob Chin
Overview Support Privacy Terms
Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

This policy explains how TimeMaxx handles information in the current version of the app.

Last updated: March 18, 2026

Privacy Policy

TimeMaxx is a local-first productivity app designed to help users plan and track time throughout the day. TimeMaxx does not require user accounts and does not operate a backend service for storing timeline data in the current version. Your app data remains on your device unless you choose to export or share it.

Information and app use

TimeMaxx does not collect, store, or transmit personal data or timeline data to external servers in the current version. The app may store information you enter directly on your device in order to provide app functionality, including timeline blocks, categories, and app preferences.

TimeMaxx does not:

  • Require account creation
  • Collect personal identifiers such as your name, email address, or location
  • Track your activity across apps or websites

Storage, retention, and sharing

Information stored by TimeMaxx is used solely to operate app features on your device. App data is stored locally using on-device storage, including SQLite in the current version, and it remains on your device until you delete it, reset app data, or remove the app.

TimeMaxx does not have access to data stored only on your device and does not integrate with third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services in the current version. If you choose to use export or sharing features, any data is generated locally on your device and shared only with destinations you explicitly select.

Children's privacy and policy changes

TimeMaxx is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. Updates will be reflected by the Last updated date on this page.

Contact

Questions about this policy can be sent to jacobchin.builds@gmail.com.
